overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Monster Hunter Wilds showing an armored player character exploring a vast underground cave system with a Palico companion. The player traverses rocky terrain, engages in brief combat with a small winged monster, collects resources, and approaches a large sunlit cave exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cave chamber with scattered rock formations

agents.ego_description: running through the open cave chamber following the Palico companion toward distant pillars

notable_agents.action: Palico companion running ahead and leading the way through the cave

entered.detail: tall jagged rock walls with layered sedimentary texture and moss patches
massive natural stone pillars rising from the cave floor to the ceiling
loose boulders and rock fragments scattered across the cave floor

segments.scene_description: The player character runs through a spacious underground cavern with towering rock walls and massive natural pillars. The Palico companion leads the way across the rocky terrain as they navigate toward a distant tunnel opening.

scene_state.functional_zone: cave alcove with ancient stone ruins

events.description: player engages a small winged monster (Wingdrake) with melee weapon attacks
monster flees and player resumes running through the cave

agents.ego_description: attacking the small winged monster with a gunlance weapon while dodging its movements

notable_agents.action: small winged monster (Wingdrake) flapping and attempting to attack before fleeing
Palico companion assisting in combat with the monster

entered.detail: weathered stone wall with block construction suggesting ancient ruins

segments.scene_description: The player enters a cave alcove with ancient stone ruins and engages in combat with a small winged monster. After a brief fight, the monster flees and the player continues moving through the cave system.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding narrow cave passage with resource nodes

events.description: player collects a glowing green item (Pilgrim's Crystal) from the ground

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow winding passages and collecting glowing resources

notable_agents.action: Palico companion leading the way through the narrow corridor

entered.detail: steep close rock walls creating a confined passage
green glowing collectible item on a rock pedestal

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a narrow, winding cave corridor with steep rock walls on both sides. The Palico continues leading ahead as the player spots and collects a glowing green crystal resource from a rock formation.

scene_state.functional_zone: cave exit tunnel approaching exterior daylight

events.description: cave opens up to reveal massive exit arch with bright daylight streaming in from outside

agents.ego_description: running toward the large cave exit following the Palico companion toward the daylight

notable_agents.action: Palico companion running ahead toward the bright cave exit

entered.detail: large natural arching cave mouth revealing bright exterior daylight and sky beyond
tall rock formations outside the cave illuminated by direct sunlight

segments.scene_description: The cave opens into a vast chamber with a massive arching exit ahead. Bright daylight streams in from the outside, illuminating the rocky terrain as the player and Palico run toward the cave mouth and the exterior landscape beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a deep underground cavern system that gradually opens into a bright, sunlit exterior. It begins with the player and their Palico companion running across rocky terrain between towering walls and massive natural pillars toward a distant tunnel. As they enter a cave alcove filled with ancient stone ruins, the camera captures a brief skirmish with a small winged monster before the path narrows into a winding corridor of steep rock walls. The scene then shifts as the player pauses to collect a glowing green crystal from a rock formation, continuing forward until the corridor expands into a vast chamber. Finally, the dark cavern gives way to a massive arching exit where bright daylight streams in, illuminating the terrain as the pair runs toward the open landscape beyond.
